channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Don’t Lift Spirit
item.description: A federal bailout of the troubled airline would be an expensive mistake.

item.title: Dobbs Lawyer Was Pressured To Avoid Taking On Roe. He Chose Courage Instead
item.description: The lawyer tasked with defending Mississippi’s 15-week abortion limit in front of the U.S. Supreme Court did so in the face of “overwhelming advice” n...

item.title: What’s with the Allergy to Patriotism?
item.description: The various efforts to prevent the rest of us from celebrating America’s 250th illustrate a lack of tolerance and humility.

item.title: Key takeaways from a report into the deadly plane crash at LaGuardia Airport
item.description: Federal investigators on Thursday detailed a series of issues and failures that led up to last month's deadly collision between a regional jet and a f...

item.title: Mourning The Loss Of USAID, The New York Times Makes A Clear Case For Its Death
item.description: They're a non-governmental organization that lives on government, period. They're an almost purely governmental non-governmental organization.

item.title: LISTEN: Can companies really build data centers in space?
item.description: Rob DeMillo, CEO of the company Sophia Space, joins the show to talk about orbital compute and the possibility of data centers in space.

item.title: The Week: Virginia’s Gerrymandering War
item.description: Plus: Manufacturing racism for fun and tax breaks.

item.title: ‘Blatantly Dishonest Language’ On Virginia Ballots Fits Long Pattern Of Democrat Word Abuse
item.description: A judge blasted the Dems' flowery ballot language as 'flagrantly misleading', failing to 'accurately describe the proposed amendment.'

item.title: Exclusive: After Federal Indictment, Watchdog Pushes IRS To Investigate SPLC’s Tax-Exempt Status
item.description: A government watchdog filed an updated IRS complaint on Thursday challenging the Southern Poverty Law Center’s (SPLC) tax-exempt status, The Federalis...

item.title: Michael Unwraps the Smear
item.description: A biopic’s machinations restore the charisma of a mass folk hero.

item.title: Federal judge orders release of family of man charged in Colorado firebomb attack
item.description: A federal judge on Thursday ordered the release from immigration custody of the family of a man charged in a fatal 2025 firebomb attack in Boulder, Co...

item.title: UK Bans Cigarettes From Killing Citizens Because Migrants Are Already Doing It So Well
item.description: The UK is banning tobacco products for young people, in a major power-sharing agreement struck between government euthanizers and migrant knife attack...

item.title: Originalist Masterwork Protects Ten Commandments Displays
item.description: This case is almost certainly bound for the Supreme Court.

item.title: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended for three weeks, Trump says after diplomats' WH meeting
item.description: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to extend their ceasefire by three weeks following a meeting in the White House, President Trump announced Thursday fro...

item.title: Trump's 'gold card' visa starting at $1 million granted to just 1 person so far, Lutnick says
item.description: President Donald Trump's "gold card" visa, where a foreigner can shell out at least $1 million to legally live and work in the U.S., has been approved...
